name: Lucrative Opportunity
description: Lucrative Opportunity is a unique Eridian relic from Borderlands 2. It is awarded during the mission Safe and Sound if you hand the incriminating photos of Moxxi to Marcus.
notes: The relic looks like a pair of coins, matching its money-focused theme.

special.description: Cuts vending machine restock time by 36.5%, speeding up the shop timer. For farming, save-quit resets are still quicker.

abilities: Causes shop timers to count down faster.
